user.title: GTT Bus
user.description: Configure the GTT stops to monitor. Enter multiple stop IDs separated by commas, spaces, semicolons, or newlines.

error.no_stops: Enter at least one stop ID.
error.invalid_stop: Stop IDs can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.
error.invalid_scan_interval: Scan interval must be at least 30 seconds.
